Video.summary: Jillian dives into an off-grid dream when she visits a one-of-a-kind Quonset hut in Joshua Tree.
Video.title: Off-Grid Living: The Creative Space

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch transforms everything from small rooms to outdoor spaces.
Video.title: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living

Image.alt: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living
The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living

Video.summary: Jillian visits two homeowners who have taken containers—and creativity—to extraordinary new heights.
Video.title: Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes

Image.alt: Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes
Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes
Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch breaks down the basic formulas for successful design.
Video.title: The Principles of Space Planning

Video.summary: Anne-Marie Barton offers homeowners a transformation that will change their spaces and their lives.
Video.title: Vero's Traditional & Modern Mix / Lexy's Comfy Condo "Glam Up"

Video.title: Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes

Image.alt: Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes
Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes
Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes

Video.summary: Jillian dives into community living, exploring how we create spaces that bring us closer together.
Video.title: From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone

Image.alt: From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone
From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Anne is an entrepreneur whose home office headquarters is having an identity crisis.
Video.title: Office

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: Building & Tending Your Garden

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: A Bountiful Harvest

Video.summary: Nate and Emily have spent months remodeling, but the kitchen has been last on their list.
Video.title: Modern Mindful Kitchen

Video.summary: Hosts Tyler and Rachel kick off the competition by introducing the four teams and assigning their first challenge.
Video.title: Meet the Neighbors

Video.summary: The teams race through the local nursery to find the perfect plants to bring life to their budding backyard designs.
Video.title: Place It & Plant It

Video.summary: Tyler and Rachel challenge the teams to select items to upcycle and repurpose in their backyard designs.
Video.title: Ultimate Upcycles

Video.summary: The stakes are high as the teams strap on their toolbelts and plan their backyards builds.
Video.title: Backyard Builds

Video.summary: The judges challenge the remaining teams to craft and present a unique menu for a backyard party.
Video.title: Mastering the Menu

Video.summary: The remaining two teams prepare their winning menus for the final challenge.
Video.title: Best on the Block

Video.summary: The Home Sort sisters transform spaces from chaos to clutter-free.
Video.title: Cleaned Up Kitchen Chaos & Clutter Busted Closet

Video.summary: Darrel and Patrice of Maxam Hotels embark on an epic journey to build a tiny home resort.
Video.title: The Blueprint

Video.summary: Darrel and Patrice begin construction, laying the foundation for the resort.
Video.title: Foundations

Video.summary: The tension begins to mount as the deadline looms larger.
Video.title: The Drop

Video.summary: It’s all hands-on deck at the resort and the team is working around the clock.
Video.title: Down to the Wire

Video.summary: With power finally in place, the Maxams begin to ready the resort for opening.
Video.title: Sewing Up Loose Ends

Video.summary: The town of Sodus shows up as the Maxams unveil The Finger Lakes Treehouse Resort.
Video.title: Ribbon Cutting

Video.summary: Before taking the class on a much-needed field trip, Brad and Jennifer drop in to check each flipper's progress.
Video.title: Demo and Drywall

Video.summary: Brad and Jennifer introduce the class to Ashley, a color specialist from Glidden.
Video.title: Doughnuts and Decisions

Video.summary: Brad and Jennifer stop by each site to see if the flippers have completed their last homework assignment.
Video.title: Who's Got the Grit?

Video.summary: Graduation looms near, and the flippers are hard at work putting the finishing touches on each home.
Video.title: Finishing Touches

Video.summary: The classmates unveil their spectacular finished homes in a final review with Brad and Jennifer.
Video.title: A "" Graduation
